revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:November 19th (lunar calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of November 19th (lunar calendar)]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: =忌日= 小林一茶新暦換算

revision.text:
{{旧暦11月}} '''旧暦11月19日'''は[[旧暦]][[11月 (旧暦)|11月]]の19日目である。六曜は[[六曜#大安|大安]]である。
== できごと == * [[正慶]]4年/[[建武 (日本)|建武]]2年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1336年]][[1月2日]]） - [[新田義貞]]らが[[足利尊氏]]追討の為、京都を出発 * [[永禄]]9年（ユリウス暦[[1566年]][[12月30日]]） - [[毛利元就]]が富田月山城の[[尼子義久]]を下す。[[尼子氏]]が滅亡 * [[寛政]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1790年]][[1月4日]]） - [[谷風梶之助]]が初の[[横綱]]土俵入り儀式の免許を受ける
== 誕生日 == * [[元和]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1624年]][[1月9日]]） - [[明正天皇]]、109代[[天皇]]（+ [[1696年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[文政]]10年（グレゴリオ暦[[1828年]][[1月5日]]） - [[小林一茶]]、[[俳諧師]]（* [[1763年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{旧暦360日}} *前日[[11月18日 (旧暦)|11月18日]] 翌日[[11月20日 (旧暦)|11月20日]] - 前月[[10月19日 (旧暦)|10月19日]] 翌月[[12月19日 (旧暦)|12月19日]] *新暦[[11月19日]]
{{stub}}

<!--== {{Lunar November}} ''November 19'''<!--Lunar November19 is the Nth day of [[11月 (旧暦)|Lunar November]]の19日目である。六曜は[[六曜#大安|大安]][[Category:大安]]である。
--> == Events == * [[正慶]]4年/[[建武 (日本)|建武]]2年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1336年]][[1月2日]]） - [[新田義貞]]らが[[足利尊氏]]追討の為、京都を出発 * [[永禄]]9年（ユリウス暦[[1566年]][[12月30日]]） - [[毛利元就]]が富田月山城の[[尼子義久]]を下す。[[尼子氏]]が滅亡 * [[寛政]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1790年]][[1月4日]]） - [[谷風梶之助 (2代)|谷風梶之助]]が初の[[横綱]]土俵入り儀式の免許を受ける
== Births == * [[元和 (日本)|元和]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1624年]][[1月9日]]） - [[明正天皇]]、109代[[天皇]]（+ [[1696年]]）
== Deaths == * [[文政]]10年（グレゴリオ暦[[1828年]][[1月5日]]） - [[小林一茶]]、[[俳諧師]]（* [[1763年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|11|18|11|20|10|19|12|11|1119}}
[[Category:kk]][[en:11月19日 (旧暦)]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[ja:11月19日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:November 19th (lunar calendar)]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:November 19th (lunar calendar)]][[ja:November 19th (lunar calendar)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:11]][[ja:November 19th (lunar calendar)]][[Category:11]] [[Category:Lunar November]] {{citation needed}}

[[sn:November 19 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 19일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月19日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 19일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十九]] [[zh:十一月十九]] [[en:draft:November 19 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar November}} '''November 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}}.
== Events == * [[正慶]]4年/[[建武 (日本)|建武]]2年（[[Julian Calendar]][[1336]][[1月2日]]） - [[新田義貞]]らが[[足利尊氏]]追討の為、京都を出発 * [[永禄]]9年（ユリウス暦[[1566]][[12月30日]]） - [[毛利元就]]が富田月山城の[[尼子義久]]を下す。[[尼子氏]]が滅亡 * [[寛政]]1st year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1790]][[1月4日]]） - [[谷風梶之助 (2代)|谷風梶之助]]が初の[[横綱]]土俵入り儀式の免許を受ける
== Births == * [[元和 (日本)|元和]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1624]][[1月9日]]） - [[明正天皇]]、109代[[天皇]]（+ [[1696]]）
== Deaths == * [[文政]]10年（グレゴリオ暦[[1828]][[1月5日]]） - [[小林一茶]]、[[俳諧師]]（* [[1763]]）
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|18|11|20|10|19|12|11|1119}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}}.
== Events == * [[正慶]]4年/[[建武 (日本)|建武]]2nd year（[[Julian Calendar]][[1336]][[1月2日]]） - [[新田義貞]]らが[[足利尊氏]]追討の為、京都を出発 * [[永禄]]9年（ユリウス暦[[1566]][[12月30日]]） - [[毛利元就]]が富田月山城の[[尼子義久]]を下す。[[尼子氏]]が滅亡 * [[寛政]]1st year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1790]][[1月4日]]） - [[谷風梶之助 (2代)|谷風梶之助]]が初の[[横綱]]土俵入り儀式の免許を受ける
== Births == * [[元和 (日本)|元和]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1624]][[1月9日]]） - [[明正天皇]]、109代[[天皇]]（+ [[1696]]）
== Deaths == * [[文政]]10年（グレゴリオ暦[[1828]][[1月5日]]） - [[小林一茶]]、[[俳諧師]]（* [[1763]]）

[[sn:November 19 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 19일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月19日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 19일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十九]] [[zh:十一月十九]] [[en:draft:November 19 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar November}} '''November 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}}.
== Events == * [[正慶]]4年/[[建武 (日本)|建武]]2nd year（[[Julian Calendar]][[1336]][[1月2日]]） - [[新田義貞]]らが[[足利尊氏]]追討の為、京都を出発 * [[永禄]]9th year（ユリウス暦[[1566]][[12月30日]]） - [[毛利元就]]が富田月山城の[[尼子義久]]を下す。[[尼子氏]]が滅亡 * [[寛政]]1st year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1790]][[1月4日]]） - [[谷風梶之助 (2代)|谷風梶之助]]が初の[[横綱]]土俵入り儀式の免許を受ける
== Births == * [[元和 (日本)|元和]]9th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1624]][[1月9日]]） - [[明正天皇]]、109代[[天皇]]（+ [[1696]]）
== Deaths == * [[文政]]10th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1828]][[1月5日]]） - [[小林一茶]]、[[俳諧師]]（* [[1763]]）

== Events == * [[Shōkyō]]4年/[[建武 (日本)|建武]]2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1336]][[1月2日]]） - [[新田義貞]]らが[[足利尊氏]]追討の為、京都を出発 * [[永禄]]9th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1566]][[12月30日]]） - [[毛利元就]]が富田月山城の[[尼子義久]]を下す。[[尼子氏]]が滅亡 * [[Kansei]]1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1790]][[1月4日]]） - [[谷風梶之助 (2代)|谷風梶之助]]が初の[[横綱]]土俵入り儀式の免許を受ける

[[sn:November 19 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 19일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月19日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 19일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十九]] [[zh:十一月十九]] [[en:draft:November 19 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * [[Shōkyō]] 4年/[[建武 (日本)|建武]] 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1336]] [[January 2]] ） - [[新田義貞]] らが[[足利尊氏]] 追討の為、京都を出発 * [[永禄]] 9th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1566]] [[December 30]] ） - [[毛利元就]] が富田月山城の[[尼子義久]] を下す。[[尼子氏]] が滅亡 * [[Kansei]] 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1790]] [[January 4]] ） - [[谷風梶之助 (2代)|谷風梶之助]] が初の[[横綱]] 土俵入り儀式の免許を受ける
== Births == * [[元和 (日本)|元和]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1624]] [[January 9]] ） - [[明正天皇]] 、109代[[天皇]] （+ [[1696]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 10th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1828]] [[January 5]] ） - [[小林一茶]] 、[[俳諧師]] （* [[1763]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|18|11|20|10|19|12|11|1119}}

revision.text:
[[sn:November 19 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 19일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月19日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 19일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十九]] [[zh:十一月十九]] [[en:draft:November 19 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * [[Shōkyō]] 4年/[[建武 (日本)|建武]] 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1336]] [[January 2]] ） - [[新田義貞]] らが[[足利尊氏]] 追討の為、京都を出発 * [[永禄]] 9th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1566]] [[December 30]] ） - [[毛利元就]] が富田月山城の[[尼子義久]] を下す。[[尼子氏]] が滅亡 * [[Kansei]] 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1790]] [[January 4]] ） - [[谷風梶之助 (2代)|谷風梶之助]] が初の[[横綱]] 土俵入り儀式の免許を受ける
== Births == * [[元和 (日本)|元和]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1624]] [[January 9]] ） - [[明正天皇]] 、109代[[天皇]] （+ [[1696]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 10th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1828]] [[January 5]] ） - [[小林一茶]] 、[[俳諧師]] （* [[1763]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|18|11|20|10|19|12|11|1119}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * [[Shōkyō]] 4年/[[建武 (日本)|建武]] 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1336]] [[January 2]] ） - [[Nitta Yoshisada]] らが[[Ashikaga Takauji]] 追討の為、京都を出発 * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 9th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1566]] [[December 30]] ） - [[Mōri Motonari]] が富田月山城の[[尼子義久]] を下す。[[尼子氏]] が滅亡 * [[Kansei]] 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1790]] [[January 4]] ） - [[谷風梶之助 (2代)|谷風梶之助]] が初の[[Yokozuna]] 土俵入り儀式の免許を受ける
== Births == * [[Genna]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1624]] [[January 9]] ） - [[明正天皇]] 、109代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[1696]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 10th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1828]] [[January 5]] ） - [[小林一茶]] 、[[Haikai Poet]] （* [[1763]] ）

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * [[Shōkyō]] 4年/[[建武 (日本)|建武]] 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1336]] [[January 2]] ） - [[Nitta Yoshisada]] らが[[Ashikaga Takauji]] 追討の為、京都を出発 * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 9th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1566]] [[December 30]] ） - [[Mōri Motonari]] が富田月山城の[[尼子義久]] を下す。[[尼子氏]] が滅亡 * [[Kansei]] 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1790]] [[January 4]] ） - [[谷風梶之助 (2代)|谷風梶之助]] が初の[[Yokozuna]] 土俵入り儀式の免許を受ける
== Births == * [[Genna]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1624]] [[January 9]] ） - [[明正天皇]] 、109代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[1696]] ）

[[sn:November 19 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 19일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月19日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 19일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十九]] [[zh:十一月十九]] [[en:draft:November 19 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * [[Shōkyō]] 4th year /[[建武 (日本)|建武]] 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1336]] [[January 2]] ） - [[Nitta Yoshisada]] らが[[Ashikaga Takauji]] 追討の為、京都を出発 * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 9th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1566]] [[December 30]] ） - [[Mōri Motonari]] が富田月山城の[[尼子義久]] を下す。[[尼子氏]] が滅亡 * [[Kansei]] 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1790]] [[January 4]] ） - [[谷風梶之助 (2代)|谷風梶之助]] が初の[[Yokozuna]] 土俵入り儀式の免許を受ける
== Births == * [[Genna]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1624]] [[January 9]] ） - [[明正天皇]] 、109代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[1696]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 10th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1828]] [[January 5]] ） - [[小林一茶]] 、[[Haiku Poet]] （* [[1763]] ）

[[sn:November 19 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 19일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月19日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 19일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十九]] [[zh:十一月十九]] [[en:draft:November 19 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * [[Shōkyō]] 4th year /[[建武 (日本)|建武]] 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1336]] [[January 2]] ） - [[Nitta Yoshisada]] らが[[Ashikaga Takauji]] 追討の為、京都を出発 * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 9th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1566]] [[December 30]] ） - [[Mōri Motonari]] が富田月山城の[[尼子義久]] を下す。[[尼子氏]] が滅亡 * [[Kansei]] 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1790]] [[January 4]] ） - [[谷風梶之助 (2代)|谷風梶之助]] が初の[[Yokozuna]] 土俵入り儀式の免許を受ける
== Births == * [[Genna]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1624]] [[January 9]] ） - [[明正天皇]] 、109代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[1696]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 10th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1828]] [[January 5]] ） - [[小林一茶]] 、[[Haiku Poet]] （* [[1763]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|18|11|20|10|19|12|11|1119}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * [[Shōkyō]] 4th year /[[建武 (日本)|建武]] 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1336]] [[January 2]] ） - [[Nitta Yoshisada]] らが[[Ashikaga Takauji]] 追討の為、京都を出発 * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 9th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1566]] [[December 30]] ） - [[Mōri Motonari]] が富田月山城の[[尼子義久]] を下す。[[尼子氏]] が滅亡 * [[Kansei]] 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1790]] [[January 4]] ） - [[谷風梶之助 (2代)|谷風梶之助]] が初の[[Yokozuna]] 土俵入り儀式の免許を受ける
== Births == * [[Genna]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1624]] [[January 9]] ） - [[明正天皇]] 、109代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[1696]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 10th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1828]] [[January 5]] ） - [[小林一茶]] 、[[Haiku Poet]] （* [[1763]] ）

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * [[Shōkyō]] 4th year /[[建武 (日本)|建武]] 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1336]] [[January 2]] ） - [[Nitta Yoshisada]] らが[[Ashikaga Takauji]] 追討の為、京都を出発 * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 9th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1566]] [[December 30]] ） - [[Mōri Motonari]] が富田月山城の[[尼子義久]] を下す。[[尼子氏]] が滅亡 * [[Kansei]] 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1790]] [[January 4]] ） - [[谷風梶之助 (2代)|谷風梶之助]] が初の[[Yokozuna]] 土俵入り儀式の免許を受ける
== Births == * [[Genna]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1624]] [[January 9]] ） - [[明正天皇]] 、109代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[1696]] ）

[[cdo:11 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十九]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November|12=draft}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|12=draft}} .
== Events == * [[Shōkyō]] 4th year /[[建武 (日本)|建武]] 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1336]] [[January 2]] ） - [[Nitta Yoshisada]] らが[[Ashikaga Takauji]] 追討の為、京都を出発 * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 9th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1566]] [[December 30]] ） - [[Mōri Motonari]] が富田月山城の[[尼子義久]] を下す。[[尼子氏]] が滅亡 * [[Kansei]] 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1790]] [[January 4]] ） - [[谷風梶之助 (2代)|谷風梶之助]] が初の[[Yokozuna]] 土俵入り儀式の免許を受ける
== Births == * [[Genna]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1624]] [[January 9]] ） - [[明正天皇]] 、109代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[1696]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政|12=draft}} 10th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1828]] [[January 5]] ） - [[小林一茶]] 、[[Haiku Poet]] （* [[1763]] ）

[[cdo:11 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十一]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 11''' is the 11th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November|12=draft}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}}, and its designated day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|12=draft}}.
== Events == * In the 2nd year of Emperor Saimei’s reign ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[643]] – December 30): Prince Yamase Ōe, a member of the imperial family, was attacked by Soga no Iruka and committed suicide. * In the 3rd year of the Enryaku era ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[784]] – December 27): Emperor Kanmu relocated the capital from Heijō-kyō to Nagaoka-kyō. * In the 1st year of the Bunji era ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1185]] – December 4): Emperor Go-Shirakawa issued an imperial decree to subdue Minamoto no Yoshitsune. * In the 9th year of the Bunmei era ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1477]] – December 16): Daikichi Masahiro withdrew his troops from Suō Province, effectively ending the Ōnin War. * In the 6th year (intercalary 11th month) of the Kansei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1795]] – January 1): Following the “Shii Incident,” Ōtsuki Genzan, a protégé of Sugita Genpaku, celebrated the New Year according to the solar calendar (the Dutch New Year) for the first time in Japan. * In the 11th year of the Bunka era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1814]] – December 22): A priest from Okayama, Kurozumi Sōchū, founded the Kurozumi religion.
== Births == * In the 6th year of the Keichō era (leap month) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1602]] – January 4): Tōdō Takatsugu, lord of the Tsushima Domain, was born (died 1676). * In the 12th year of the Bunsei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1829]] – December 6): Yūri Kōsei, a politician who drafted the original version of the Five-Article Oath, was born (died 1909). * In the 1st year of the Kaei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1848]] – December 6): Kawakami Sōroku, an officer in the Imperial Japanese Army, was born (died 1899). * In the 2nd year of the Kaei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1849]] – December 25): Nogi Maresuke, a general in the Imperial Japanese Army, was born (died 1912). * In the 2nd year of the Bunkyū era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1862]] – December 31): Watarase Shōzaburō, a zoologist, was born (died 1929).
== Deaths == * In the 2nd year of Emperor Saimei’s reign ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[643]] – December 30): Prince Yamase Ōe, a royal family member and child of Prince Shōtoku, died. * In the 4th year of Emperor Saimei’s reign ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[658]] – December 11): Prince Arima, a child of Emperor Tenmu, died. * In the 4th year of the Teiwa era (also the 3rd year of the Shōhei era) ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1348]] – December 2): Emperor Hanazono, the 95th Emperor of Japan, died (born 1297).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|10|11|12|10|11|12|11|1111}}

Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Shōkyō|ja|正恭}} 4th year / {{ill|Kenmu|ja|建武}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1336]] [[January 2]]) – {{ill|Nitta Yoshisada|ja|新田義貞}} and his forces departed Kyoto to pursue {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|足利尊氏}}. * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 9th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1566]] [[December 30]]) – {{ill|Mōri Motonari|ja|毛利元就}} defeated {{ill|Amako Yoshiaki|ja|尼子義久}} at Tomida Tsukiyama Castle, leading to the extinction of the Amako clan. * {{ill|Kansei|ja|寛政}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1790]] [[January 4]]) – {{ill|Tanikaze Kajinosuke (2nd)|ja|谷風梶之助}} received permission for the first yokozuna ring-entering ceremony.
== Births == * {{ill|Genna|ja|元和}} 9th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1624]] [[January 9]]) – {{ill|Meisei Tennō|ja|明正天皇}}, the 109th Emperor of Japan (died [[1696]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政|12=draft}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1828]] [[January 5]]) – {{ill|Kobayashi Issa|ja|小林一茶}}, a haiku poet (born [[1763]]).

Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|12=draft|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Shōkyō|ja|正恭|12=draft}} 4th year / {{ill|Kenmu|ja|建武|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1336]] [[January 2]]) – {{ill|Nitta Yoshisada|ja|新田義貞|12=draft}} and his forces departed Kyoto to pursue {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|足利尊氏|12=draft}}. * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 9th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1566]] [[December 30]]) – {{ill|Mōri Motonari|ja|毛利元就|12=draft}} defeated {{ill|Amako Yoshiaki|ja|尼子義久|12=draft}} at Tomida Tsukiyama Castle, leading to the extinction of the Amako clan. * {{ill|Kansei|ja|寛政|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1790]] [[January 4]]) – {{ill|Tanikaze Kajinosuke (2nd)|ja|谷風梶之助|12=draft}} received permission for the first yokozuna ring-entering ceremony.
== Births == * {{ill|Genna|ja|元和|12=draft}} 9th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1624]] [[January 9]]) – {{ill|Meisei Tennō|ja|明正天皇|12=draft}}, the 109th Emperor of Japan (died [[1696]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政|12=draft|12=draft}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1828]] [[January 5]]) – {{ill|Kobayashi Issa|ja|小林一茶|12=draft}}, a haiku poet (born [[1763]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|18|11|20|10|19|12|11|1119}}
[[cdo:11 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十九]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十九]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十九]]

revision.text:
{{旧暦11月}} '''旧暦11月19日'''は[[11月 (旧暦)|旧暦11月]]の19日目である。六曜は[[六曜#大安|大安]]である。
== できごと == * [[正慶]]4年/[[建武 (日本)|建武]]2年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1336年]][[1月2日]]） - [[新田義貞]]らが[[足利尊氏]]追討の為、京都を出発 * [[永禄]]9年（ユリウス暦[[1566年]][[12月30日]]） - [[毛利元就]]が富田月山城の[[尼子義久]]を下す。[[尼子氏]]が滅亡 * [[寛政]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1790年]][[1月4日]]） - [[谷風梶之助 (2代)|谷風梶之助]]が初の[[横綱]]土俵入り儀式の免許を受ける
== 誕生日 == * [[元和 (日本)|元和]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1624年]][[1月9日]]） - [[明正天皇]]、109代[[天皇]]（+ [[1696年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[文政]]10年（グレゴリオ暦[[1828年]][[1月5日]]） - [[小林一茶]]、[[俳諧師]]（* [[1763年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|11|18|11|20|10|19|12|11|1119}}

revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840504]] Wikidata name: 19th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:36, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 19|qq=November 19}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 19일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Shōkyō|1=Shōkyō|2=ja|3=正慶|ja|正恭|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōkyō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1069086}} 4th year / [[:en:Jianwu|Kenmu]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1336|1336]] [[:en:January 2|January 2]]) – [[:en:Nitta Yoshisada|Nitta Yoshisada]] and his forces departed Kyoto to pursue [[:en:Ashikaga Takauji|Ashikaga Takauji]]. * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 9th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1566|1566]] [[:en:December 30|December 30]]) – [[:en:Mōri Motonari|Mōri Motonari]] defeated [[:en:Amago Yoshihisa|Amako Yoshiaki]] at Tomida Tsukiyama Castle, leading to the extinction of the Amako clan. * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1790|1790]] [[:en:January 4|January 4]]) – {{ill|Tanikaze Kajinosuke (2nd)|ja|谷風梶之助|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanikaze Kajinosuke (2nd)|qq=|1=Tanikaze Kajinosuke (2nd)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q27500648}} received permission for the first yokozuna ring-entering ceremony.
== Births == * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1624|1624]] [[:en:January 9|January 9]]) – [[:en:Empress Meishō|Meisei Tennō]], the 109th Emperor of Japan (died [[:en:1696|1696]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1828|1828]] [[:en:January 5|January 5]]) – [[:en:Kobayashi Issa|Kobayashi Issa]], a haiku poet (born [[:en:1763|1763]]).

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月19日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 19일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月十九]][[zh:十一月十九]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840504]] Wikidata name: 19th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:36, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 19|qq=November 19}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 19일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Shōkyō|1=Shōkyō|2=ja|3=正慶|ja|正恭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōkyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1069086}} 4th year / [[:en:Jianwu|Kenmu]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1336|1336]] [[:en:January 2|January 2]]) – [[:en:Nitta Yoshisada|Nitta Yoshisada]] and his forces departed Kyoto to pursue [[:en:Ashikaga Takauji|Ashikaga Takauji]]. * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 9th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1566|1566]] [[:en:December 30|December 30]]) – [[:en:Mōri Motonari|Mōri Motonari]] defeated [[:en:Amago Yoshihisa|Amako Yoshiaki]] at Tomida Tsukiyama Castle, leading to the extinction of the Amako clan. * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1790|1790]] [[:en:January 4|January 4]]) – {{ill|Tanikaze Kajinosuke (2nd)|ja|谷風梶之助|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanikaze Kajinosuke (2nd)|1=Tanikaze Kajinosuke (2nd)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q27500648}} received permission for the first yokozuna ring-entering ceremony.
== Births == * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1624|1624]] [[:en:January 9|January 9]]) – [[:en:Empress Meishō|Meisei Tennō]], the 109th Emperor of Japan (died [[:en:1696|1696]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1828|1828]] [[:en:January 5|January 5]]) – [[:en:Kobayashi Issa|Kobayashi Issa]], a haiku poet (born [[:en:1763|1763]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|18|11|20|10|19|12|11|1119|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

== Events == * {{ill|Shōkyō|1=Shōkyō|2=ja|3=正慶|ja|正恭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōkyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1069086}} 4th year / [[:en:Jianwu|Kenmu]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1336|1336]] [[:en:January 2|January 2]]) – [[:en:Nitta Yoshisada|Nitta Yoshisada]] and his forces departed Kyoto to pursue [[:en:Ashikaga Takauji|Ashikaga Takauji]]. * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 9th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1566|1566]] [[:en:December 30|December 30]]) – [[:en:Mōri Motonari|Mōri Motonari]] defeated [[:en:Amago Yoshihisa|Amako Yoshiaki]] at Tomida Tsukiyama Castle, leading to the extinction of the Amako clan. * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1790|1790]] [[:en:January 4|January 4]]) – {{ill|Tanikaze Kajinosuke (2nd)|ja|谷風梶之助|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanikaze Kajinosuke (2nd)|1=Tanikaze Kajinosuke (2nd)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q27500648}} received permission for the first yokozuna ring-entering ceremony.
== Births == * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1624|1624]] [[:en:January 9|January 9]]) – [[:en:Empress Meishō|Meisei Tennō]], the 109th Emperor of Japan (died [[:en:1696|1696]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1828|1828]] [[:en:January 5|January 5]]) – [[:en:Kobayashi Issa|Kobayashi Issa]], a haiku poet (born [[:en:1763|1763]]).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月19日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 19일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月十九]][[zh:十一月十九]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月19日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 19일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月十九]][[zh:十一月十九]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月19日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 19일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月十九]][[zh:十一月十九]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840504]] Wikidata name: 19th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:36, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 19|qq=November 19}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 19일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Shōkyō|1=Shōkyō|2=ja|3=正慶|ja|正恭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōkyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1069086}} 4th year / [[:en:Jianwu|Kenmu]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1336|1336]] [[:en:January 2|January 2]]) – [[:en:Nitta Yoshisada|Nitta Yoshisada]] and his forces departed Kyoto to pursue [[:en:Ashikaga Takauji|Ashikaga Takauji]]. * [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 9th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1566|1566]] [[:en:December 30|December 30]]) – [[:en:Mōri Motonari|Mōri Motonari]] defeated [[:en:Amago Yoshihisa|Amako Yoshiaki]] at Tomida Tsukiyama Castle, leading to the extinction of the Amako clan. * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1790|1790]] [[:en:January 4|January 4]]) – {{ill|Tanikaze Kajinosuke (2nd)|ja|谷風梶之助|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanikaze Kajinosuke (2nd)|1=Tanikaze Kajinosuke (2nd)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q27500648}} received permission for the first yokozuna ring-entering ceremony.
== Births == * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1624|1624]] [[:en:January 9|January 9]]) – [[:en:Empress Meishō|Meisei Tennō]], the 109th Emperor of Japan (died [[:en:1696|1696]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1828|1828]] [[:en:January 5|January 5]]) – [[:en:Kobayashi Issa|Kobayashi Issa]], a haiku poet (born [[:en:1763|1763]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|18|11|20|10|19|12|11|1119|qq=}}

== Events == * {{ill|Shōkyō|1=Shōkyō|2=ja|3=正慶|ja|正恭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōkyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1069086}} 4th year / {{ill|Jianwu|en|Jianwu|WD=Q11065423|lt=Kenmu}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1336|en|1336|WD=Q6028|lt=1336}} {{ill|January 2|en|January 2|WD=Q2151|lt=January 2}}) – {{ill|Nitta Yoshisada|en|Nitta Yoshisada|WD=Q1328796|lt=Nitta Yoshisada}} and his forces departed Kyoto to pursue {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|en|Ashikaga Takauji|WD=Q297107|lt=Ashikaga Takauji}}. * {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|WD=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku}} 9th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1566|en|1566|WD=Q6638|lt=1566}} {{ill|December 30|en|December 30|WD=Q2901|lt=December 30}}) – {{ill|Mōri Motonari|en|Mōri Motonari|WD=Q1156545|lt=Mōri Motonari}} defeated {{ill|Amago Yoshihisa|en|Amago Yoshihisa|WD=Q837428|lt=Amako Yoshiaki}} at Tomida Tsukiyama Castle, leading to the extinction of the Amako clan. * {{ill|Kansei|en|Kansei|WD=Q1195131|lt=Kansei}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1790|en|1790|WD=Q7775|lt=1790}} {{ill|January 4|en|January 4|WD=Q2168|lt=January 4}}) – {{ill|Tanikaze Kajinosuke (2nd)|ja|谷風梶之助|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanikaze Kajinosuke (2nd)|1=Tanikaze Kajinosuke (2nd)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q27500648}} received permission for the first yokozuna ring-entering ceremony.
== Births == * {{ill|Yuanhe|en|Yuanhe|WD=Q10889567|lt=Genna}} 9th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1624|en|1624|WD=Q6821|lt=1624}} {{ill|January 9|en|January 9|WD=Q2238|lt=January 9}}) – {{ill|Empress Meishō|en|Empress Meishō|WD=Q120564|lt=Meisei Tennō}}, the 109th Emperor of Japan (died {{ill|1696|en|1696|WD=Q7699|lt=1696}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|WD=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1828|en|1828|WD=Q7570|lt=1828}} {{ill|January 5|en|January 5|WD=Q2202|lt=January 5}}) – {{ill|Kobayashi Issa|en|Kobayashi Issa|WD=Q312709|lt=Kobayashi Issa}}, a haiku poet (born {{ill|1763|en|1763|WD=Q7655|lt=1763}}).

{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 19일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844|1=taian}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Shōkyō|1=Shōkyō|2=ja|3=正慶|ja|正恭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōkyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1069086}} 4th year / {{ill|Jianwu|en|Jianwu|WD=Q11065423|lt=Kenmu|1=Jianwu}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1336|en|1336|WD=Q6028|lt=1336|1=1336}} {{ill|January 2|en|January 2|WD=Q2151|lt=January 2|1=January 2}}) – {{ill|Nitta Yoshisada|en|Nitta Yoshisada|WD=Q1328796|lt=Nitta Yoshisada|1=Nitta Yoshisada}} and his forces departed Kyoto to pursue {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|en|Ashikaga Takauji|WD=Q297107|lt=Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji}}. * {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|WD=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku|1=Eiroku}} 9th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1566|en|1566|WD=Q6638|lt=1566|1=1566}} {{ill|December 30|en|December 30|WD=Q2901|lt=December 30|1=December 30}}) – {{ill|Mōri Motonari|en|Mōri Motonari|WD=Q1156545|lt=Mōri Motonari|1=Mōri Motonari}} defeated {{ill|Amago Yoshihisa|en|Amago Yoshihisa|WD=Q837428|lt=Amako Yoshiaki|1=Amago Yoshihisa}} at Tomida Tsukiyama Castle, leading to the extinction of the Amako clan. * {{ill|Kansei|en|Kansei|WD=Q1195131|lt=Kansei|1=Kansei}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1790|en|1790|WD=Q7775|lt=1790|1=1790}} {{ill|January 4|en|January 4|WD=Q2168|lt=January 4|1=January 4}}) – {{ill|Tanikaze Kajinosuke (2nd)|ja|谷風梶之助|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanikaze Kajinosuke (2nd)|1=Q27500648|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q27500648}} received permission for the first yokozuna ring-entering ceremony.
== Births == * {{ill|Yuanhe|en|Yuanhe|WD=Q10889567|lt=Genna|1=Yuanhe}} 9th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1624|en|1624|WD=Q6821|lt=1624|1=1624}} {{ill|January 9|en|January 9|WD=Q2238|lt=January 9|1=January 9}}) – {{ill|Empress Meishō|en|Empress Meishō|WD=Q120564|lt=Meisei Tennō|1=Empress Meishō}}, the 109th Emperor of Japan (died {{ill|1696|en|1696|WD=Q7699|lt=1696|1=1696}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|WD=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei|1=Bunsei}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1828|en|1828|WD=Q7570|lt=1828|1=1828}} {{ill|January 5|en|January 5|WD=Q2202|lt=January 5|1=January 5}}) – {{ill|Kobayashi Issa|en|Kobayashi Issa|WD=Q312709|lt=Kobayashi Issa|1=Kobayashi Issa}}, a haiku poet (born {{ill|1763|en|1763|WD=Q7655|lt=1763|1=1763}}).
